  • Reference
    • Manage trees and plot coordinates with BIOMASS

Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Maxime Réjou-Méchain. Author, data contributor.

  • Guillaume Cornu. Author.

  • Dominique Lamonica. Author, maintainer.

  • Arthur Pere. Author.

  • Ariane Tanguy. Author.

  • Camille Piponiot. Author.

  • Jerome Chave. Data contributor.

  • Bruno Hérault. Author.

  • Ted Feldpausch. Data contributor.

  • Philippe Verley. Contributor.

  • Arthur Bailly. Author.

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Rejou-Mechain M, Tanguy A, Piponiot C, Chave J, Herault B (2017). “BIOMASS : an R package for estimating above-ground biomass and its uncertainty in tropical forests.” Methods in Ecology and Evolution, 8(9). ISSN 2041210X, doi:10.1111/2041-210X.12753. 

@Article{,
  title = {BIOMASS : an {R} package for estimating above-ground biomass and its uncertainty in tropical forests},
  volume = {8},
  issn = {2041210X},
  doi = {10.1111/2041-210X.12753},
  language = {en},
  number = {9},
  journal = {Methods in Ecology and Evolution},
  author = {Maxime Rejou-Mechain and Ariane Tanguy and Camille Piponiot and Jerome Chave and Bruno Herault},
  editor = {Sarah Goslee},
  year = {2017},
}

On this page
